name: judgement-server
comment: dev/db run wrangler from the repo root with state OUTSIDE judgement/ — otherwise wrangler's .wrangler tmp dir lands inside the watched assets dir and triggers a reload loop that drops WebSockets.

scripts.db:local: cd ../.. && wrangler d1 execute judgement --config judgement/server/wrangler.toml --local --persist-to .judgement-state --file judgement/server/schema.sql
